case_title: US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ND VS. GLORIA ORTIZ et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DECLARATION FOR PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ND
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ND SERVED FEB-01-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, GLORIA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
